title: Smoky Beef Shepherd's Pie
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with smoky beef and topped with a crispy crumble crust.
instructions: Brown the smoky beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Sprinkle the flour over the meat mixture and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the beef broth and milk to the skillet, whisking constantly.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the crumbly cheese until melted.
Transfer the meat mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix together the crumble topping ingredients until crumbly.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the meat mixture.
Dot the top of the crumble topping with the butter.
Bake the shepherd's pie in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the crumble topping is golden brown.
